description: Fresh email from returning customer with previous repairs visible
latestMessage: Hi, my iPhone is having charging issues again. Can you let me know the next step?
draft:
Hi Sarah,

Thank you for your message.
Your device is still in diagnostics at the moment, so I do not have a confirmed quote yet.
As soon as the assessment is complete I will update you with the repair cost and next steps.

Kind regards,
Alex
